title: lavatera maritima var. rupestris
intro: Lavatera maritima var. rupestris is a variety of the shrub-like plant known as 'Rock Sea Lavender', which is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Lavatera maritima var. rupestris is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
